name: Oldambt (Netherlands)
description: A light-blue field with four white wavy stripes, and a yellow hoist band with an indented inner edge bearing five red six-pointed stars.
history: Flag of the municipality of Oldambt in the east of the province of Groningen, formed in 2010 from Winschoten, Scheemda and Reiderland. The wavy stripes evoke the region's waterways.

features.role: a yellow hoist band with an indented inner edge
five red six-pointed stars on the hoist band
